name: qoderclicn-test
description: Use Qoder CN CLI from Codex to generate test patches and verify changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run Qoder CN CLI as a read-only test verifier.
interface.longDescription: Qoder CN Test lets Codex delegate test patch generation, unit tests, browser automation tests, and final verification to qoderclicn while keeping source edits under Codex control.
defaultPrompt: Use Qoder CN to verify my latest changes.
Ask Qoder CN to generate a test patch.
Run Qoder CN browser automation verification.
